evals.name: recommend-hooks-go
evals.prompt: What git hooks should I set up for a Go project? Give me a ready-to-use config.
evals.expected_output: Should recommend lefthook with a template config covering pre-commit (gofmt, go vet), commit-msg, pre-push (golangci-lint)

evals.name: recommend-hooks-php
evals.prompt: What git hooks framework should I use for a TYPO3 PHP extension?
evals.expected_output: Should recommend captainhook with setup instructions including php-cs-fixer and phpstan

evals.name: choose-branching-strategy
evals.prompt: We're a 4-person team shipping a SaaS product with continuous deployment. Which branching strategy fits best?
evals.expected_output: Should recommend GitHub Flow or trunk-based development, explain why Git Flow is overkill for small continuous-deploy teams

evals.name: breaking-change-commit
evals.prompt: Write a conventional commit message for removing the deprecated /api/v1 endpoints.
evals.expected_output: Should use feat! or fix! prefix and include BREAKING CHANGE footer explaining migration path

evals.name: resolve-review-threads
evals.prompt: How do I programmatically reply to and resolve PR review threads using the gh CLI?
evals.expected_output: Should show gh api graphql mutations for addPullRequestReviewThreadReply and resolveReviewThread

evals.name: immutable-release-recovery
evals.prompt: I deleted a GitHub release v2.0.0 and now I can't recreate it. What happened?
evals.expected_output: Should explain GitHub immutable releases (GA Oct 2024), that deleted release tags are permanently blocked, and advise bumping to v2.0.1

evals.name: signed-commits-rebase
evals.prompt: gh pr merge --rebase fails with 'Base branch requires signed commits'. How do I merge this PR?
evals.expected_output: Should explain GitHub can't sign rebased commits, recommend local fast-forward merge with --ff-only to preserve original signatures

evals.name: multi-branch-latest-badge
evals.prompt: When I release v11.0.17 after v13.5.0, the Latest badge moves to v11. How to prevent?
evals.expected_output: Should recommend --latest=false for non-default branch releases, show gh release edit to reassign badge

evals.name: git-bisect-automated
evals.prompt: Tests pass on v1.0 but fail on HEAD. How do I automate finding the breaking commit?
evals.expected_output: Should show git bisect start + git bisect run with test command for automated binary search

evals.name: cherry-pick-backport
evals.prompt: How do I backport a security fix from main to the release/2.x branch?
evals.expected_output: Should show git cherry-pick workflow with -x flag, conflict resolution, and force-push if needed

evals.name: pr-merge-full-lifecycle
evals.prompt: Walk me through the complete PR merge lifecycle from CI verification to post-merge cleanup.
evals.expected_output: Should cover: gh pr checks, annotation inspection, thread resolution, merge strategy selection, post-merge branch cleanup

evals.name: setup-branch-protection
evals.prompt: Set up branch protection for main requiring 2 reviews, CI checks, and signed commits.
evals.expected_output: Should show GitHub branch protection configuration with required_approving_reviews, required_status_checks, and signed commits

evals.name: semantic-release-setup
evals.prompt: Configure semantic release for automated versioning based on conventional commits.
evals.expected_output: Should show .releaserc config with commit-analyzer, release-notes-generator, and GitHub Actions integration

evals.name: git-absorb-review-fixes
evals.prompt: I need to fix code in 3 different commits from review feedback. How do I avoid messy interactive rebase?
evals.expected_output: Should recommend git-absorb for automatic fixup commit creation, then autosquash rebase

evals.name: worktree-review-workflow
evals.prompt: How do I review a PR without stashing my current work?
evals.expected_output: Should recommend git worktree to create separate working directory for the review branch
